recommendations.title: Wilson
recommendations.overview: Middle-aged and divorced, Wilson finds himself lonely, smug, and obsessed with his past.

recommendations.title: The Parenting
recommendations.overview: Boyfriends Josh and Rohan plan a weekend getaway to introduce their parents, only to discover that their rental is home to a 400-year-old poltergeist.

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Twins

recommendations.title: Shithouse

recommendations.title: A Clockwork Orange

recommendations.title: The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex
recommendations.overview: While trying to prove to her family she can be mature and responsible, teen wizard Alex Russo conjures up a spell to rid herself of her bad qualities, unintentionally creating a Good and Evil Alex. When Evil Alex gets involved in a plan to take over

recommendations.title: Bottom of the World
recommendations.overview: On their road trip through the southwestern desert, Alex and his girlfriend Scarlett arrive in a town in the middle of nowhere and take a room in a mysterious hotel so that Scarlett, who is feeling increasingly ill, can get some rest.

recommendations.title: Bang Gang (A Modern Love Story)
recommendations.overview: Biarritz. Sixteen-year-old George, the high school hottie, falls in love with Alex. To get his attention, she initiates a group game with Alex, Nikita, Laetitia and Gabriel. They will discover, test, and push the limits of their sexuality.

recommendations.title: The Troubleshooter
